arts.ttl: Chelsea Have No Interest in Pursuing €45M-Rated Liverpool, PSG Transfer Target
arts.sum: In September, TEAMTalk reported that Liverpool are looking to revamp their attack in 2025, with Borussia Dortmund’s Karim Adeyemi among their targets. The report indicates that Dortmund could be willing to sell the 22-year-old for under €45 million. arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have identified an attacking issue this season, particularly in the UEFA Champions League, where goals have been hard to come by for Luis Enrique and his squad. Earlier in 2024, PSG was linked with Liverpool’s standout winger Luis Díaz, but those rumors never materialized. arts.ttl: Juventus prefer David Hancko over Milan Skriniar
arts.sum: Juventus are actively seeking defensive reinforcements for the January transfer window. Injuries to key players Bremer and Cabal have forced Cristiano Giuntoli to re-enter the market, aiming to provide coach Thiago Motta with at least one, if not two, new defenders. The post Juventus prefer David Hancko over Milan Skriniar appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Liverpool target teases January transfer after leaving PSG 'furious'
arts.sum: Cherki was already expected to get sold in the summer as he only had a year left to run on his contract but no transfer ultimately materialised, which prompted Lyon to extend the homegrown's deal by a year. The French youth international is one of the players expected to be sacrificed as Lyon seek to raise funds to stave off their provisional relegation to Ligue 2.

arts.ttl: PSG earn a major victory in Kylian Mbappé wage dispute

arts.sum: During the summer, Atletico Madrid tried to sign another midfielder alongside Conor Gallagher, who joined from Chelsea.
